validation: Review used only local repository files, local command output, and the issue text supplied in the prompt; no network lookup or remote issue fetch was used.
Inspected tracked diff for sdk/python/src/attestplane/proof_bundle.py, sdk/python/src/attestplane/verifier.py, and sdk/python/tests/conformance/FIXTURE_HASHES.lock.
Inspected untracked issue-137 assets, SDK example files, tests/conformance/README.md, canonicalization vector JSON files, and tests/conformance/test_canonicalization_minimum_bundle_vectors.py.
No release gate, runbook, CI, hook, or check-fixture script weakening was found.
No priority or severity lowering was found.
No secret values or credential reads/logging were found in the reviewed diff; keyword scan found only redline text and existing fixture payload labels.
No publish, tag, release, merge, package-publish, PyPI, or remote-push logic was modified.
No key tests were deleted; the diff adds canonicalization conformance vectors and tests.
Behavior changes are covered by focused local evidence: env PYTHONPATH=sdk/python/src pytest tests/conformance/test_canonicalization_minimum_bundle_vectors.py -q passed with 8 tests.
Fixture hash lock evidence: ./scripts/check-fixture-hashes.sh passed with 24 files and all canonical hashes matching.
Verifier fixture evidence: env PYTHONPATH=sdk/python/src pytest tests/verifier/test_conformance_fixtures.py -q passed with 2 tests.

Schema plus canonicalization evidence: env PYTHONPATH=sdk/python/src pytest tests/verifier/test_proof_bundle_schema.py tests/conformance/test_canonicalization_minimum_bundle_vectors.py -q passed with 15 tests.
Existing gate report under docs/validation/local_codex_runner/issue-137/gate_report.json reports PASS for area:verifier commands: 12 verifier conformance tests and 9 schema/fixture tests.
residual_risks: Full repository gate was not run as part of this self-review; validation was focused on verifier/conformance scope and the existing area:verifier gate report.
The review did not fetch the GitHub issue body and therefore relied on the supplied issue title, URL, labels, and local planning artifacts for scope.

The new python -m attestplane.verifier entrypoint uses Python json.loads and does not itself reject duplicate raw JSON keys; the added conformance test models duplicate-key rejection through its local strict loader helper rather than through that CLI path.
